name: Fordefi
description: Self-custodial MPC wallet platform with DeFi support and treasury management API.

seo.title: Fordefi — Identity / Auth / User Management
seo.meta_description: Fordefi: Self-custodial MPC wallet platform with DeFi support and treasury management API.

when_to_use: Self-custodial MPC wallet for institutional DeFi treasury
Policy-based transaction signing for DAO operations
Multi-approver workflow for high-value crypto disbursements
DeFi protocol interaction with smart contract risk review
Institutional-grade key management for Web3 teams

pros: Self-custodial MPC with policy engine for DeFi access
Browser extension plus API for treasury workflows
Transaction simulation and risk checks built-in
cons: Focused on institutions; overkill for small teams
Learning curve for policy modeling and roles
Limited chain breadth vs generic MPC providers
Pricing is enterprise; unclear for small wallets
review.verdict: Good pick for funds and DAOs that want DeFi access with policy guardrails, not a consumer wallet SDK.
review.best_for: Crypto funds, DAOs and treasuries interacting with DeFi protocols
review.not_for: Consumer-facing apps needing embedded wallet onboarding
